title: Unacademy is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Unacademy is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Subject Matter Expert looking for your next big career move? Unacademy in Kanpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Unacademy:
Unacademy is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Support students with special educational needs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Unacademy!
